site.zoning: -- TBD: City of Burien GIS zoning map (burienwa.gov/gis) or iMap
site.notes: TBD - A: legalDescription -- King County Recorder / iMap (gis.kingcounty.gov). yearBuilt and existing occupancy -- King County Assessor (blue.kingcounty.gov/assessor). | TBD - C: zoning -- City of Burien zoning map; all standards (FAR, height, setbacks, density) -- Burien Municipal Code (codepublishing.com/WA/Burien). | TBD - D: community plan, transit overlays -- City of Burien Comprehensive Plan; TPA check -- PSRC (Puget Sound Regional Council) or Sound Transit GIS. Airport influence -- SEA (SeaTac) ALUCP, Port of Seattle. Fire hazard -- WA DNR (wadnr.gov). Fault zone -- USGS seismic hazard. | TBD - E: Fees -- City of Burien permit fee schedule (WA state = no NEF equivalent; check impact fees and connection fees separately). | TBD - F: Project type, architect, scope of work. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts -- City of Burien Permit Center (206-248-5510). | TBD - H: Map rotation -- estimate from aerial. Parcel polygon vertices already captured (see parcelPolygon field).
